lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.
The car is in poor condition. The exterior has significant damage and the interior shows heavy wear. It has major mechanical issues and requires extensive repairs to be operational.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive mechanical and cosmetic repairs to be roadworthy. The exterior shows significant wear, including multiple large dents, heavy paint oxidation, and visible rust on the lower body panels. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn and torn in several places, and the dashboard has several cracks. Mechanically, the engine runs but requires a major tune-up, and the transmission exhibits slipping. This car is being sold as-is and is ideal for someone looking for a major restoration project or a source for parts.

Get ready to hit the road in this fantastic find! This car is in great shape and has clearly been well-cared for over the years. It offers a smooth, reliable ride and looks wonderful inside and out, showing only minor, typical signs of use. It's a dependable vehicle that's ready for many more miles of adventure!

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust and major body damage. The interior is heavily worn with torn upholstery and damaged trim. The engine requires major repairs and is currently not in reliable running condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic repairs to be roadworthy. The engine has trouble starting and exhibits a loud knocking sound when running, suggesting internal damage. The transmission shifts roughly, and there are visible leaks from both the radiator and oil pan. Cosmetically, the car has several large dents, peeling clear coat, and patches of rust along the rocker panels. The interior is heavily worn with torn seats and non-functional air conditioning. This is a project car sold strictly as-is.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a balance of luxury and proven reliability. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it features a robust powertrain and a well-preserved interior that reflects diligent ownership. Every component has been scrutinized to ensure mechanical integrity and continued performance on the road. We invite you to experience the refined handling and sophisticated presence of this exceptional automobile, offered at a competitive valuation that prioritizes both quality and long-term value.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a reliable companion. It’s in really solid shape and drives like a dream—perfect for anyone looking for a dependable set of wheels without the brand-new price tag! I’ve taken great care of it, so it’s ready to hit the road with you today. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Good condition. Runs well. Clean title. Maintenance current. Reliable transport.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of reliability and style. The exterior retains a beautiful shine, showing only minor, expected road wear consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the cabin is clean and inviting, with well-preserved upholstery and fully functional electronics that ensure a comfortable commute. Mechanically, the car is in strong shape, featuring a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that has been serviced regularly. With plenty of tread left on the tires and a solid service history, this car is ready for the road today. It represents an excellent opportunity for a buyer seeking a dependable, high-quality vehicle without the new-car price tag.

This exceptional vehicle offers a refined driving experience, characterized by its mechanical soundness and well-preserved aesthetic. Having been subjected to a rigorous professional evaluation, it demonstrates consistent performance and structural integrity. The interior remains in commendable condition, reflecting a history of responsible ownership and attentive maintenance. This represents a distinguished acquisition for the client who prioritizes both value and proven reliability.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, offering a distinguished combination of performance and reliability. This unit has been subjected to a rigorous professional inspection to ensure its mechanical integrity and continued operational excellence. Demonstrating consistent care and a clean history, this selection represents a premier opportunity for the value-conscious professional who refuses to compromise on quality.

Hey there! I'm selling my trusty car and it has been such a joy to drive. It runs smoothly and is ready for its next adventure with a new owner! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions—I'd love to see it go to a good home!

Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Regular maintenance performed. Runs smoothly.

This well-maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and daily utility. The exterior features a deep, glossy finish that has been regularly waxed, though it shows minor, expected road wear consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary; the leather seating is supple and free of major blemishes, while all electronic features—from the premium sound system to the dual-zone climate control—function exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is robust. It has followed a strict service schedule, with recent fluid changes and a fresh set of tires ensuring a smooth, confident ride. There are no warning lights on the dash and the engine pulls cleanly through every gear. It is a reliable, attractive choice for a discerning driver who appreciates a car that has been treated with respect and diligence.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, meticulously maintained to ensure peak operational integrity. An ideal selection for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of sophistication and enduring value.

Used car. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Minimal exterior wear. Recent oil change. Title in hand.

This 2019 luxury sedan has been meticulously maintained and remains in excellent mechanical health. The exterior shines with a deep luster, showing only minor signs of road use consistent with a well-loved vehicle. Inside, the premium leather interior is smoke-free and remarkably clean, with all tech features and climate controls functioning perfectly. It comes with a full service history, a recent oil change, and tires that have plenty of tread remaining. A smooth, quiet, and dependable ride for anyone seeking quality and performance without the new-car price tag.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of performance and long-term value. Secure a sophisticated asset that combines proven reliability with executive presence.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive engineering, this vehicle has been maintained to a high standard of mechanical and aesthetic integrity. Hey there! I'm selling my trusty car and it's been such a joy to drive. It's in really solid shape and has been well-maintained over the years. Perfect for someone looking for a reliable ride that still looks great on the road! I've taken good care of it, and it's totally ready for its next adventure with a new owner. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions or want to come take a look!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54B32 power plant, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rod bearing replacement using ACL shells. The 6-speed manual gearbox offers crisp engagement, paired with a factory limited-slip differential. The chassis remains structurally sound with a reinforced rear subframe. Suspension is tight, utilizing Bilstein dampers and refreshed bushings. While the exterior shows minor road rash consistent with its mileage, the mechanical integrity is superlative, offering a pure longitudinal RWD driving experience.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained engine. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear. Reliable daily driver.

This vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking a reliable, well-maintained daily driver that still turns heads. The exterior maintains a lustrous finish with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful use, while the body panels remain straight and true. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean and smoke-free; the upholstery is free of rips or major wear, and every feature—from the ice-cold air conditioning to the intuitive infotainment system—operates perfectly. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and quiet, benefiting from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule and a recent full-synthetic oil change. The transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension provides a composed, comfortable ride. With a fresh set of tires and a clean bill of health from a recent multi-point inspection, this car is fully prepared for its next chapter without needing immediate investment.

Presenting a vehicle of distinguished character and proven reliability. This model has been curated for the driver who values mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic. Maintained to a high standard, it offers a sophisticated driving experience and represents an exceptional acquisition within its class.
